channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Justice Department publishes some missing Epstein files related to Trump
item.description: The Justice Department has published additional Epstein files related to allegations that President Trump sexually abused a minor after an NPR investigation found dozens of pages were withheld.
item.content:encoded:
The Justice Department has published additional Epstein files related to allegations that President Trump sexually abused a minor after an NPR investigation found dozens of pages were withheld.

(Image credit: Department of Justice and Getty Images/Collage by Danielle A. Scruggs/NPR)
item.dc:creator: Stephen Fowler

item.title: Travel industry pushes Congress to end DHS shutdown and pay federal security workers
item.description: With the busy spring break travel season looming, travel and aviation industry leaders urged Congress to end the stalemate over DHS funding before workers at TSA and ports miss a full paycheck.
item.content:encoded:
With the busy spring break travel season looming, travel and aviation industry leaders urged Congress to end the stalemate over DHS funding before workers at TSA and ports miss a full paycheck.

(Image credit: Patrick T. Fallon)
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose

item.title: They were led off course in a big race. But a fix is more complicated than prize money
item.description: Top finishers in the Atlanta half marathon are calling for U.S. track officials to ensure that Jess McClain and two other athletes aren't excluded from the world championships because of an error.
item.content:encoded:
Top finishers in the Atlanta half marathon are calling for U.S. track officials to ensure that Jess McClain and two other athletes aren't excluded from the world championships because of an error.

(Image credit: Matthew Demarko)
item.dc:creator: Bill Chappell

item.title: President Trump, Pam Bondi sued over sale of TikTok assets
item.description: The case accuses the Trump administration of ignoring legislation designed to stop the spread of Chinese propaganda — and instead helping to broker a partial sale to businessmen close to Trump.
item.content:encoded:
The case accuses the Trump administration of ignoring legislation designed to stop the spread of Chinese propaganda — and instead helping to broker a partial sale to businessmen close to Trump.

(Image credit: Anthony Kwan)
item.dc:creator: Carrie Johnson

item.title: A rift between Spain and Trump widens over Spanish opposition to the Iran war
item.description: The Spanish government reiterated it would not let U.S. forces use two joint military bases in Spain as the U.S.-Israeli war in Iran escalates, widening a rift with the Trump administration.
item.content:encoded:
The Spanish government reiterated it would not let U.S. forces use two joint military bases in Spain as the U.S.-Israeli war in Iran escalates, widening a rift with the Trump administration.

(Image credit: AP)
item.dc:creator: Miguel Macias

item.title: March (Audio) Madness! Here are the finalists in NPR's College Podcast Challenge
item.description: From 75 campuses across 35 states, we've listened to hundreds of student entries to select the very best for NPR's College Podcast Challenge.
item.content:encoded: From 75 campuses across 35 states, we've listened to hundreds of student entries to select the very best for NPR's College Podcast Challenge.
item.dc:creator: Steve Drummond

item.title: Announcing the 2025 NPR College Podcast Challenge Honorable Mentions
item.description: Here are some of the best entries in NPR's 2025 College Podcast Challenge.
item.content:encoded: Here are some of the best entries in NPR's 2025 College Podcast Challenge.
item.dc:creator: Student Podcast Challenge

item.title: Concerns about maintenance of aircraft carrier USS Ford
item.description: The aircraft carrier USS Gerald R. Ford has been at the center of two major conflicts in recent months. Some parents of crew members and lawmakers worry about the impact of its lengthy deployment.
item.content:encoded: The aircraft carrier USS Gerald R. Ford has been at the center of two major conflicts in recent months. Some parents of crew members and lawmakers worry about the impact of its lengthy deployment.
item.dc:creator: Steve Walsh

item.title: Satellite images show Iran school strike hit more buildings than earlier reported
item.description: The images suggest that precision munitions struck other buildings, including a clinic that was also inside the complex.
item.content:encoded: The images suggest that precision munitions struck other buildings, including a clinic that was also inside the complex.
item.dc:creator: Geoff Brumfiel

item.title: A Biden-era rule sought to stabilize child care. Why Trump wants it gone
item.description: The Trump administration has proposed repealing a Biden-era rule that required states to change how they pay out child care subsidies, citing the potential for fraud.
item.content:encoded:
The Trump administration has proposed repealing a Biden-era rule that required states to change how they pay out child care subsidies, citing the potential for fraud.

(Image credit: Nadezhda1906)
item.dc:creator: Andrea Hsu
